introSection:
Aerial Glide was a Steel Suspended roller coaster located at Shipley Glen Pleasure Grounds in Shipley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

By the time it closed in 2002, it was one of the oldest roller coasters in the world.
fullText:
Aerial Glide was a Steel Suspended roller coaster located at Shipley Glen Pleasure Grounds in Shipley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

By the time it closed in 2002, it was one of the oldest roller coasters in the world.
